home.badge: Nen tang Q&A #1 cho Hoi nghi & Su kien
home.heroDesc: Tang cuong su tham gia, thu thap phan hoi va ket noi khan gia - du la truc tiep, online hay hybrid - voi nen tang Q&A thong minh duoc ho tro boi AI.
home.joinDesc: Co ma phong? Nhap ben duoi de tham gia va tuong tac ngay trong phien.
home.joinHint: Hoi chu phong de lay ma phong tham gia Q&A
home.errorRoomNotFound: Ma phong khong ton tai hoac da het han.
home.errorGeneral: Da co loi xay ra, vui long thu lai.
home.featuresSubtitle: Lua chon nhieu dinh dang tuong tac phu hop voi noi dung phien, hinh thuc va phong cach cua dien gia.
home.reviewsSubtitle: Duoc tin dung boi hang ngan nguoi to chuc su kien tren toan the gioi
home.feedbackTitle: Chia se phan hoi cua ban
home.feedbackSubtitle: Chung toi muon nghe tu ban. Hay giup chung toi cai thien hoi thao.
home.feedbackMessage: Phan hoi hoac gop y cua ban...
home.footerRights: Tat ca quyen duoc bao luu

features.qaDesc: Thu thap va quan ly cau hoi voi AI tu dong phan loai, gom nhom cau hoi tuong tu va uu tien theo muc do quan tam.
features.voiceDesc: AI tu dong nhan dien giong noi, phan biet cau hoi cua khan gia va cau tra loi cua dien gia trong thoi gian thuc.
features.uploadDesc: Upload slide thuyet trinh de AI trich xuat keyword, tao cau hoi mau va cai thien do chinh xac nhan dien giong noi.
features.analyticsDesc: Theo doi muc do tuong tac, chu de hot, va xuat bao cao chi tiet sau moi phien hoi thao.
features.aiModerationDesc: Loc va uu tien cau hoi thong minh duoc ho tro boi cac thuat toan AI tien tien
features.realTimeSyncDesc: Cap nhat tuc thi tren tat ca thiet bi voi do tre duoi giay cho tuong tac lien mach
features.securityDesc: Ma hoa cap ngan hang va tuan thu SOC 2 cho su an tam cua ban
features.participants: Nguoi tham du khong gioi han
features.participantsDesc: Mo rong phien den hang ngan nguoi tham du ma khong co van de hieu suat
features.voiceDesc: Cho phep nguoi tham du dat cau hoi bang giong noi de tang kha nang tiep can
features.multilingualDesc: Dich thuat thoi gian thuc va ho tro hon 50 ngon ngu tren toan the gioi
features.analyticsDesc: Thong tin chi tiet ve muc do tuong tac, chu de pho bien va so lieu khan gia
features.recordingDesc: Tu dong ghi lai va chep lai toan bo phien Q&A de tham khao trong tuong lai
features.gamificationDesc: Thu hut khan gia voi diem so, huy hieu va bang xep hang cho su tham gia

dashboard.title: Bang dieu khien
dashboard.subtitle: Quan ly cac phien Q&A va tuong tac voi khan gia cua ban
dashboard.noSessionsHint: Tao phien dau tien cua ban de bat dau

voiceDemo.title: Huong dan su dung Voice Hoi thao
voiceDemo.subtitle: Xem cach Voice AI hoat dong trong phien hoi thao
voiceDemo.step1Desc: Tao phien moi, upload ban thuyet trinh de AI trich xuat keyword va cau hoi goi y
voiceDemo.step2Desc: Hien thi QR code hoac chia se ma phong de khan gia tham gia
voiceDemo.step3Desc: Bat mic de AI nhan dien giong noi dien gia va khan gia trong thoi gian thuc
voiceDemo.step4Desc: AI phan loai, gom nhom cau hoi tuong tu va ghep cau tra loi tu dong

uploadFeature.title: Upload ban thuyet trinh
uploadFeature.description: AI se trich xuat keyword tu slide de cai thien do chinh xac nhan dien giong noi va tao cau hoi goi y cho khan gia.

voiceFeature.title: Voice Hoi thao
voiceFeature.description: Tu dong nhan dien giong noi, phan biet dien gia va khan gia. AI se ghep cau tra loi voi cau hoi tuong ung.

join.beFirstToAsk: Hay la nguoi dau tien dat cau hoi!
join.aiModerated: Cau hoi duoc kiem duyet boi AI truoc khi hien thi
join.questionProcessing: Cau hoi cua ban da duoc gui va dang duoc xu ly...

session.noQuestionsToShow: Khong co cau hoi de hien thi
session.noQuestionsHint: Thu bo loc khac hoac chia se ma phong
session.shareCode: Chia se ma nay voi khan gia cua ban
session.speaker: Dien gia

voice.enableToSee: Bat AI Voice de xem ban ghi
voice.speakerAnswer: Cau tra loi tu dien gia
voice.audienceDesc: AI nhan dien cau hoi tu nguoi tham du va tu dong tao cau hoi moi tren dashboard
voice.speakerDesc: AI nhan dien cau tra loi va tu dong khop voi cau hoi tuong ung
voice.aiDesc: Tu dong phan loai, gom nhom cau hoi tuong tu va danh dau da tra loi

classification.enableDesc: Hien thi badge phan loai tren cau hoi de giup nguoi tham du hieu ro tinh chat cua cau hoi

createSession.title: Tao phien moi
createSession.subtitle: Cau hinh truoc khi bat dau
createSession.voiceAIDesc: Tu dong nhan dien giong noi va phan loai cau hoi/tra loi
createSession.livePollDesc: Tao khao sat va quiz thoi gian thuc
createSession.voiceAIInfo: Khi bat Voice AI, he thong se tu dong nhan dien giong noi cua dien gia va khan gia, phan loai noi dung thanh cau hoi hoac cau tra loi.
createSession.uploadDesc: AI se trich xuat keyword va tao cau hoi goi y tu noi dung slide cua ban
createSession.supportedFormats: Ho tro: PDF, PPT, PPTX (toi da 50MB)
createSession.processingDesc: Dang trich xuat keyword va tao cau hoi goi y...
createSession.keywordsHelp: Cac keyword nay se giup Voice AI nhan dien chinh xac hon
createSession.questionsHelp: Cau hoi nay co the duoc hien thi de khan gia tham khao
createSession.voiceLanguage: Ngon ngu nhan dien giong noi
createSession.strictDesc: Loc nghiem ngat tat ca noi dung khong phu hop
createSession.moderateDesc: Can bang giua kiem duyet va tu do bieu dat
createSession.relaxedDesc: Chi loc nhung noi dung vi pham nghiem trong
